sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66216" key="membrafu/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεμβρ-ᾰφύα</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῠ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, a kind of <sense id="n66216.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">anchovy</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0420.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristonym.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
